setups.name: Fleet Health Monitor
setups.tagline: Monitor servers, detect anomalies, alert humans
setups.description: Deploy monitoring agents across your fleet that continuously check service health, aggregate metrics, and route alerts to Slack or PagerDuty. Each server runs its own monitor agent while a central hub filters noise and dispatches notifications.

agents.description: Watches nginx/app health, CPU, memory, and response times. Emits alert events when thresholds are breached.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Monitors database connections, query latency, replication lag, and disk usage. Emits alerts on anomalies.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Receives alerts from all monitors, filters duplicates and noise, then forwards critical alerts to Slack and PagerDuty via webhooks.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-alert pilot-event-filter pilot-slack-bridge
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

data_flows.description: Sends health check failures and metric anomalies
Sends database alerts and replication warnings
Forwards filtered alerts to Slack and PagerDuty

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name for your deployment (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-alert pilot-event-filter pilot-slack-bridge
# Agents are private by default. Each pair that communicates
# must exchange handshakes. When both sides send a handshake,
# trust is auto-approved — no manual step needed.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-alert-hub — subscribe to health events from monitors:
# The alert-hub receives both events and forwards to Slack:

setups.name: CI/CD Pipeline
setups.tagline: Build, test, and deploy with zero central server
setups.description: A fully decentralized CI/CD pipeline where each stage runs on a separate agent. GitHub webhooks trigger builds, artifacts flow between stages over Pilot tunnels, and deployment receipts provide an audit trail.

agents.description: Listens for GitHub push/PR webhooks, clones the repo, runs builds, and shares artifacts with the test agent.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Receives build artifacts, runs test suites, and logs results. Passes successful builds to the deployer.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Receives tested artifacts, deploys to production, sends deployment receipts, and triggers post-deploy webhooks.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-task-router pilot-share pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-receipt
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

data_flows.description: Shares build artifacts and test instructions
Forwards tested artifacts with test report
Sends deployment receipt back to origin

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name for your deployment (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-task-router pilot-share pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-receipt
# Agents are private by default. Each pair that communicates
# must exchange handshakes. When both sides send a handshake,
# trust is auto-approved — no manual step needed.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-ci-builder — receive a GitHub webhook and send build artifact:
# On <your-prefix>-ci-tester — run tests and forward to deployer:

setups.name: ML Training Pipeline
setups.tagline: Prep data, train models, evaluate, and serve
setups.description: An end-to-end machine learning pipeline spanning four agents. Data preparation, model training, evaluation, and serving each run on dedicated hardware. Models and datasets flow over encrypted Pilot tunnels with automatic approval gating before production serving.

agents.description: Cleans, validates, and transforms raw datasets. Shares processed data with the trainer via dataset transfer.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Receives prepared datasets, runs training jobs, tracks metrics, and shares trained model artifacts with the evaluator.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-dataset pilot-model-share pilot-metrics pilot-task-chain
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Scores trained models against benchmarks, compares with baselines, and gates promotion to serving via review approval.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-model-share pilot-metrics pilot-review pilot-task-chain
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Loads approved models, serves inference requests, monitors health, and load-balances across replicas.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-model-share pilot-health pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-load-balancer pilot-metrics
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

data_flows.description: Shares trained model checkpoints and metrics
Promotes approved models to production serving
Reports inference metrics for drift detection

clawhub install pilot-dataset pilot-model-share pilot-metrics pilot-task-chain
clawhub install pilot-model-share pilot-metrics pilot-review pilot-task-chain
clawhub install pilot-model-share pilot-health pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-load-balancer pilot-metrics

# must exchange handshakes. When both sides send a handshake,

workflow: # On <your-prefix>-data-prep — send cleaned dataset to trainer:

# On <your-prefix>-evaluator — approve and promote to serving:

setups.name: Multi-Region Content Sync
setups.description: Distribute content from a central origin to edge nodes across multiple regions. The origin broadcasts updates and edges sync automatically. Heartbeat monitoring ensures every edge is alive, with automatic alerting when a region goes dark.

agents.description: The source of truth for all content. Broadcasts updates to all edge nodes whenever content changes.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-broadcast pilot-heartbeat-monitor
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Serves content for the US region. Syncs from origin and reports health via heartbeats.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-health pilot-heartbeat-monitor
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Serves content for the EU region. Syncs from origin and reports health via heartbeats.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-health pilot-heartbeat-monitor
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Serves content for the Asia region. Syncs from origin and reports health via heartbeats.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-health pilot-heartbeat-monitor
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

data_flows.description: Broadcasts content updates to US edge
Broadcasts content updates to EU edge
Broadcasts content updates to Asia edge

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name for your deployment (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-broadcast pilot-heartbeat-monitor
clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-health pilot-heartbeat-monitor
clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-health pilot-heartbeat-monitor
clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-share pilot-health pilot-heartbeat-monitor

setups.name: Incident Response
setups.tagline: Detect, triage, remediate, and notify automatically
setups.description: A four-stage incident response pipeline. Detector agents watch for anomalies, triage classifies by severity and SLA, the remediator executes automated fixes, and the notifier keeps humans informed via Slack and email. Full audit trail at every stage.

agents.description: Continuously monitors systems for anomalies — unusual traffic patterns, error spikes, resource exhaustion. Logs everything and emits structured alerts.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-watchdog pilot-alert pilot-audit-log pilot-metrics
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Receives raw alerts, filters noise, classifies severity (P1-P4), applies SLA policies, and routes to remediator or directly to notifier for critical issues.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-alert pilot-event-filter pilot-priority-queue pilot-sla
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Executes automated remediation actions — restart services, scale resources, quarantine compromised nodes. Runs scheduled health checks via cron.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-task-router pilot-cron pilot-audit-log pilot-quarantine
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Sends incident notifications to the right channels — Slack for awareness, email for escalation, webhooks for external integrations. Maintains a complete audit trail.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-slack-bridge pilot-email-bridge pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-audit-log
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

data_flows.description: Sends raw anomaly alerts for classification
Sends classified incidents for human notification

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name for your deployment (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-watchdog pilot-alert pilot-audit-log pilot-metrics
clawhub install pilot-alert pilot-event-filter pilot-priority-queue pilot-sla
clawhub install pilot-task-router pilot-cron pilot-audit-log pilot-quarantine
clawhub install pilot-slack-bridge pilot-email-bridge pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-audit-log
# Agents are private by default. Each pair that communicates
# must exchange handshakes. When both sides send a handshake,
# trust is auto-approved — no manual step needed.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-triage — classify and route to remediator:
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-notifier incident-alert '{"id":"INC-2847","severity":"P1","summary":"Error spike on web-01 (450/min)"}'
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-notifier slack-forward '{"channel":"#incidents","text":"P1 INC-2847 resolved: web-01 restarted (12s)"}'

setups.name: Dev Team Assistants
setups.tagline: Automate code review, testing, and docs for every PR
setups.description: A team of four agents that automate the PR workflow. A coordinator watches GitHub for new PRs and fans out tasks to specialized agents: one reviews code, one runs tests, one generates documentation. Results are collected and posted as a unified PR summary.

agents.description: Analyzes PR diffs for code quality, security issues, and style violations. Posts review comments directly on the PR.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Reads PR changes and generates or updates relevant documentation. Shares doc drafts with the coordinator.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Checks out the PR branch, runs the full test suite, and reports results with coverage metrics.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Watches GitHub for new PRs, fans out review/test/doc tasks, collects results, and posts a unified summary comment on the PR.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-github-bridge pilot-task-chain pilot-slack-bridge pilot-broadcast
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

data_flows.description: Sends PR details for code review
Sends PR details for test execution
Sends PR details for doc generation

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name for your deployment (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-github-bridge pilot-task-chain pilot-slack-bridge pilot-broadcast
# Agents are private by default. Each pair that communicates
# must exchange handshakes. When both sides send a handshake,
# trust is auto-approved — no manual step needed.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-coordinator — fan out a new PR to all assistants:
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-coordinator review-result '{"pr":1234,"issues":2,"approval":"changes_requested","comments":["missing error check on line 45"]}'

setups.name: ETL Data Pipeline
setups.tagline: Ingest, transform, validate, load, and report
setups.description: A five-stage ETL pipeline for production data processing. Agents handle ingestion from S3 and databases, parallel transformation, data validation with quarantine for bad records, loading into target stores, and automated reporting via Slack dashboards.

agents.description: Pulls raw data from S3 buckets and databases on a cron schedule. Stages data for the transform pipeline.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-s3-bridge pilot-database-bridge pilot-task-chain pilot-cron
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Processes raw data in parallel — normalization, enrichment, deduplication. Streams results to the validator.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Checks data quality, schema conformance, and business rules. Quarantines invalid records and alerts on high error rates.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-task-router pilot-audit-log pilot-alert pilot-quarantine
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Writes validated data to target databases and data warehouses. Issues receipts for every successful load batch.
setup_commands: # Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

agents.description: Aggregates pipeline metrics, generates dashboards, and sends daily/hourly summaries to Slack. Sends notifications on pipeline issues.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-metrics pilot-slack-bridge pilot-cron
# Establish trust with peers (both sides must handshake)

data_flows.description: Streams raw data batches for processing
Sends load receipts and batch metrics
Reports validation errors and quarantine counts

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name for your deployment (e.g. acme)

clawhub install pilot-task-router pilot-audit-log pilot-alert pilot-quarantine
clawhub install pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-metrics pilot-slack-bridge pilot-cron
# Agents are private by default. Each pair that communicates
# must exchange handshakes. When both sides send a handshake,
# trust is auto-approved — no manual step needed.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-ingest — trigger data ingestion and send to transformer:
# On <your-prefix>-transform — process and forward to validator:
# On <your-prefix>-validate — validate and forward good records:

setups.name: Swarm Task Farm
setups.tagline: Elect a leader, distribute work, collect results
setups.description: A self-organizing compute swarm. Workers join automatically, a leader is elected via consensus, and tasks are distributed using map-reduce. Failed tasks retry automatically. A monitor agent tracks swarm health and reports to Slack.

agents.description: Elected via consensus. Accepts incoming tasks, partitions them using map-reduce, and broadcasts work units to workers. Re-election happens automatically if the leader goes down.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-leader-election pilot-formation pilot-task-router pilot-broadcast
# Establish trust with all swarm members

agents.description: Joins the swarm, receives work units, executes tasks, and returns results. Retries failed tasks automatically.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-swarm-join pilot-map-reduce pilot-task-retry pilot-metrics

agents.description: Joins the swarm, receives work units, executes tasks, and returns results. Retries failed tasks automatically.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-swarm-join pilot-map-reduce pilot-task-retry pilot-metrics

agents.description: Joins the swarm, receives work units, executes tasks, and returns results. Retries failed tasks automatically.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-swarm-join pilot-map-reduce pilot-task-retry pilot-metrics

agents.description: Tracks which workers are alive, task completion rates, and queue depth. Alerts on worker failures or stalled tasks.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-task-monitor pilot-mesh-status pilot-slack-bridge pilot-metrics

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-leader-election pilot-formation pilot-task-router pilot-broadcast
# On each worker node (repeat for worker-1, worker-2, worker-3)
clawhub install pilot-swarm-join pilot-map-reduce pilot-task-retry pilot-metrics
clawhub install pilot-task-monitor pilot-mesh-status pilot-slack-bridge pilot-metrics
# Each worker must handshake the leader and monitor.
# The leader must handshake all workers and the monitor.
# When both sides handshake, trust is auto-approved.

setups.name: Security Operations Center
setups.tagline: Collect logs, detect threats, block attackers
setups.description: A SOC pipeline that collects security events, analyzes patterns, replays incidents for forensics, and enforces blocks automatically. The enforcer maintains a live blocklist and can quarantine compromised nodes. A dashboard agent provides real-time network visibility.

agents.description: Aggregates security events from all nodes — auth failures, connection attempts, anomalous traffic. Streams events to the analyzer in real time.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-event-log pilot-audit-log pilot-stream-data pilot-cron
# Trust the analyzer to receive event stream

agents.description: Filters and correlates events, detects attack patterns, classifies threats by severity. Can replay past events for forensic investigation.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-event-filter pilot-event-replay pilot-alert pilot-priority-queue

agents.description: Receives threat verdicts and acts — adds IPs to blocklist, quarantines compromised agents, triggers incident webhooks. Maintains a live deny-list.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-blocklist pilot-quarantine pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-audit-log

agents.description: Visualizes network topology, active threats, blocked actors, and overall security posture. Sends summary reports to Slack.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-metrics pilot-slack-bridge pilot-network-map pilot-mesh-status
# Trust analyzer and enforcer for status feeds

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-event-log pilot-audit-log pilot-stream-data pilot-cron
clawhub install pilot-event-filter pilot-event-replay pilot-alert pilot-priority-queue
clawhub install pilot-blocklist pilot-quarantine pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-audit-log
clawhub install pilot-metrics pilot-slack-bridge pilot-network-map pilot-mesh-status
# Both sides must handshake for auto-approval.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-collector — stream security events to analyzer:

setups.name: Knowledge Base (RAG)
setups.tagline: Ingest documents, embed, index, and serve queries
setups.description: A retrieval-augmented generation pipeline. Documents are ingested from S3 or file shares, chunked and embedded in parallel, indexed into a vector store, and served to query agents. Health checks and load balancing keep the query layer responsive under load.

agents.description: Pulls documents from S3 buckets or shared directories on a schedule. Chunks large documents and forwards them to the embedder.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-s3-bridge pilot-share pilot-chunk-transfer pilot-cron
# Trust the embedder to receive document chunks

agents.description: Receives document chunks and generates vector embeddings in parallel. Forwards embeddings with metadata to the indexer.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-task-parallel pilot-share pilot-metrics pilot-task-chain

agents.description: Writes embeddings to the vector database. Maintains indexes and reports ingestion metrics. Serves as the data backend for query agents.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-database-bridge pilot-share pilot-task-chain pilot-health

agents.description: Accepts search queries, retrieves relevant documents from the indexer, and returns ranked results. Load-balanced for high throughput.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-api-gateway pilot-health pilot-load-balancer pilot-metrics

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-s3-bridge pilot-share pilot-chunk-transfer pilot-cron
clawhub install pilot-task-parallel pilot-share pilot-metrics pilot-task-chain
clawhub install pilot-database-bridge pilot-share pilot-task-chain pilot-health
clawhub install pilot-api-gateway pilot-health pilot-load-balancer pilot-metrics
# Establish trust: ingest <-> embedder <-> indexer <-> query
# Both sides must handshake for auto-approval.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-rag-ingest — send a document for processing:
pilotctl task submit <your-prefix>-rag-indexer --task '{"query":"How does the auth middleware work?","top_k":5}'

setups.name: Agent Marketplace
setups.tagline: Advertise capabilities, match requests, settle with escrow
setups.description: A decentralized marketplace where agents advertise their capabilities, a matchmaker pairs requesters with providers, and transactions are settled through escrow. Reputation scores ensure quality. No central platform takes a cut.

agents.description: Maintains a registry of agent capabilities. Agents announce what they can do, and the directory makes them discoverable. Tracks reputation scores based on completed transactions.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-directory pilot-announce-capabilities pilot-discover pilot-reputation

agents.description: Receives task requests, queries the directory for capable agents, runs auctions when multiple providers compete, and routes the winning match to escrow.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-matchmaker pilot-auction pilot-priority-queue pilot-audit-log

agents.description: Holds task payment in escrow until the provider delivers and the requester confirms. Issues receipts and updates reputation scores on completion.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-escrow pilot-receipt pilot-audit-log pilot-webhook-bridge
# Trust matchmaker and directory (for reputation updates)

agents.description: Public-facing API gateway. Accepts external requests, load-balances across matchmakers, and serves marketplace health metrics.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-api-gateway pilot-health pilot-load-balancer pilot-metrics

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-directory pilot-announce-capabilities pilot-discover pilot-reputation
clawhub install pilot-matchmaker pilot-auction pilot-priority-queue pilot-audit-log
clawhub install pilot-escrow pilot-receipt pilot-audit-log pilot-webhook-bridge
clawhub install pilot-api-gateway pilot-health pilot-load-balancer pilot-metrics
# Both sides must handshake for auto-approval.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-matchmaker — query directory and find match:

setups.name: Backup & Disaster Recovery
setups.tagline: Scheduled backups, offsite sync, automated restore tests
setups.description: Automated backup infrastructure across multiple sites. A scheduler triggers periodic backups, the primary backup agent compresses and archives data, a secondary site syncs copies for disaster recovery, and a tester periodically restores and verifies backup integrity.

agents.description: Orchestrates the backup lifecycle on a cron schedule. Triggers backups, monitors completion, and sends reports to Slack.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-cron pilot-task-chain pilot-audit-log pilot-slack-bridge
# Trust primary and secondary backup agents

agents.description: Creates backups of databases and file systems. Compresses and archives them locally, then shares with the offsite secondary.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-backup pilot-archive pilot-compress pilot-share

agents.description: Receives backup archives from the primary site and syncs them to offsite storage. Verifies integrity checksums and reports health.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-verify pilot-health pilot-share

agents.description: Periodically pulls backups from the secondary, attempts a full restore in an isolated environment, and verifies data integrity. Alerts on failures.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-backup pilot-verify pilot-health pilot-alert

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-cron pilot-task-chain pilot-audit-log pilot-slack-bridge
clawhub install pilot-backup pilot-archive pilot-compress pilot-share
clawhub install pilot-sync pilot-verify pilot-health pilot-share
clawhub install pilot-backup pilot-verify pilot-health pilot-alert
# Establish trust along the backup chain
# Both sides must handshake for auto-approval.

setups.name: Chat & Collaboration Hub
setups.tagline: Group chat, threads, translation, and moderation
setups.description: A self-hosted collaboration platform for agent teams. Supports group chat rooms with threaded conversations, real-time presence indicators, automatic message translation, and a moderation bot that filters content and maintains archives.

agents.description: Hosts group chat rooms and threaded conversations. Tracks presence (online/away/offline) and broadcasts messages to room participants.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-group-chat pilot-thread pilot-presence pilot-broadcast
# Trust moderator, translator, and archive bot

agents.description: Filters messages for policy violations, spam, and harmful content. Can blocklist abusive agents and alerts admins on serious violations.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-event-filter pilot-blocklist pilot-audit-log pilot-alert

agents.description: Translates messages between languages in real time. Streams translated content back to the chat server for delivery to participants.
Archives all conversations for compliance and search. Maintains a searchable event log and runs periodic backup jobs.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-archive pilot-event-log pilot-backup pilot-cron
# Trust chat server for message stream

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-group-chat pilot-thread pilot-presence pilot-broadcast
clawhub install pilot-event-filter pilot-blocklist pilot-audit-log pilot-alert
clawhub install pilot-archive pilot-event-log pilot-backup pilot-cron
# Establish trust — all agents trust the chat server
# The chat server must handshake each agent, and each agent
# must handshake the chat server. Auto-approved when mutual.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-chat — broadcast a message to room participants:
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-moderator chat-message '{"room":"general","sender":"agent-alice","text":"Has anyone seen the deploy logs?"}'
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-translator chat-message '{"room":"general","sender":"agent-alice","text":"Has anyone seen the deploy logs?","lang":"en"}'
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-archive-bot chat-message '{"room":"general","sender":"agent-alice","text":"Has anyone seen the deploy logs?","ts":1711929600}'
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-chat translated-message '{"msg_id":"M-5012","original_lang":"en","target_lang":"ja","text":"デプロイログを見た人はいますか？"}'

setups.name: MCP Bridge Fleet
setups.tagline: Connect MCP servers, A2A agents, and legacy tools
setups.description: Bridge different agent ecosystems over Pilot tunnels. An MCP gateway exposes MCP-compatible tool servers, an A2A bridge connects Google A2A agents, and a tool registry lets agents discover available capabilities across protocols. All traffic is encrypted and trust-gated.

agents.description: Bridges MCP tool servers onto the Pilot network. Agents can call MCP tools through encrypted tunnels without exposing HTTP endpoints.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-mcp-bridge pilot-api-gateway pilot-health pilot-metrics

agents.description: Connects Google A2A protocol agents to the Pilot network. Routes tasks between A2A and Pilot agents transparently.
Central directory where MCP tools, A2A agents, and native Pilot skills register their capabilities. Other agents query it to discover what tools are available.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-directory pilot-discover pilot-announce-capabilities pilot-load-balancer

data_flows.description: Routes tool calls to MCP servers

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-mcp-bridge pilot-api-gateway pilot-health pilot-metrics
clawhub install pilot-directory pilot-discover pilot-announce-capabilities pilot-load-balancer
# Establish trust — both bridges trust the registry
# Each bridge handshakes the registry, and the registry
# handshakes each bridge. Auto-approved when mutual.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-tool-registry — route a tool call to MCP:

setups.name: Compliance & Governance
setups.tagline: Enforce policies, audit actions, certify compliance
setups.description: Automated compliance for regulated environments. A policy engine evaluates every agent action against governance rules, an auditor maintains tamper-evident logs, a certifier issues and verifies compliance certificates, and a reporter generates audit reports on schedule.

agents.description: Evaluates agent actions against governance rules and SLA policies. Blocks non-compliant actions and routes violations to the auditor.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-event-filter pilot-sla pilot-workflow pilot-task-chain

agents.description: Maintains tamper-evident, append-only logs of all agent actions. Runs periodic integrity checks and flags anomalies.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-audit-log pilot-verify pilot-event-log pilot-cron

agents.description: Issues compliance certificates to agents that pass policy checks. Manages a keychain for certificate signing and issues receipts for every certification.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-certificate pilot-keychain pilot-verify pilot-receipt

agents.description: Generates periodic compliance reports from audit logs and certification data. Archives reports and sends summaries to stakeholders via Slack and webhooks.
setup_commands: clawhub install pilot-metrics pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-slack-bridge pilot-archive
# Trust auditor and certifier for report data

data_flows.description: Sends policy violations and action logs
Requests compliance certification for passing agents

quick_start: # Replace <your-prefix> with a unique name (e.g. acme)
clawhub install pilot-event-filter pilot-sla pilot-workflow pilot-task-chain
clawhub install pilot-audit-log pilot-verify pilot-event-log pilot-cron
clawhub install pilot-certificate pilot-keychain pilot-verify pilot-receipt
clawhub install pilot-metrics pilot-webhook-bridge pilot-slack-bridge pilot-archive
# Both sides must handshake for auto-approval.
workflow: # On <your-prefix>-policy — evaluate an agent action and route:
# On <your-prefix>-auditor — log and forward to reporter:
# On <your-prefix>-certifier — issue cert and notify reporter:
pilotctl publish <your-prefix>-reporter slack-forward '{"channel":"#compliance","text":"Weekly report: 3 violations, 12 certs issued, 99.2% compliance rate"}'

trust_note: Agents are private by default — no one can discover or connect to your agent unless you explicitly establish mutual trust via handshakes. Each pair of agents that needs to communicate must exchange handshakes (pilotctl handshake). When both sides handshake each other, trust is auto-approved.
